prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第56名，近年排名在54–61名之间 波动，整体稳定，属中上游211；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情或投档断档事件；抖音平台热度一般，未进入全国高校热度前100名，报考关注度无明 显异常波动；该校以地质学、地质资源与地质工程为传统优势，相关学科在全国处于领先地位。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算 机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，该校相关专业设置齐全，对考生有一定吸引力；安徽省2026年普通高考总人数约45.1万，按近年比例估算物理类 约31.3万人，较2025年物理类32.1万人略有减少，竞争压力微降物理类本科批2025年461分、2024年465分，略有下降，反映整体难度略有降低；中国地质大学（武汉）位于湖北武汉，属中部地区，对安徽考生地理距离适中，跨省报考意愿正常。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基 准位次24109名、2026年缩招约3.7%、本省物理类考生略有减少、，缩招对竞争的影响略大于考生减少的缓解作用，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅前移。预 测最低位次约23770名，区间23270–24270名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 14928, 30476, 34825, 24546, and 24109 respectively. Rankings significantly dropped from 2021 to 2023, then notably rebounded from 2024 onward, stabilizing in the 24000–24500 range in recent two years, with a 2025 baseline of about 24109. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui Province was 155 in 2021, 153 in 2022, 143 in 2023, 151 in 2024, and 161 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 155, a reduction of 6 students (about –3.7%) compared to 2025, implying slightly intensified competition within the province.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 56th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, fluctuating between 54th and 61st in recent years, overall stable, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. Its reputation has been steady in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment cutoff incidents. On Douyin platform, its popularity is average, not entering the top 100 national university popularity rankings, with no abnormal fluctuations in application attention. The university has traditional strengths in geology, geological resources, and geological engineering, with related disciplines leading nationally.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. The university offers a comprehensive set of related majors, attracting some candidates. The total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Anhui Province in 2026 is about 451,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 313,000 based on recent proportions, slightly fewer than the 2025 Physics Category of 321,000, slightly reducing competition pressure. The Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 461 in 2025 and 465 in 2024, a slight decrease, reflecting a slight reduction in overall difficulty. China University of Geosciences (Wuhan) is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with moderate geographical distance for Anhui candidates, and normal cross-province application willingness.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 24109, a 2026 enrollment reduction of about 3.7%, and a slight decrease in Physics Category candidates in the province, the impact of enrollment reduction on competition slightly outweighs the alleviation from candidate reduction. It is predicted that the 2026 minimum ranking will slightly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 23770, with a range of 23270–24270.

- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Geology (National Top Talent Program/National Science Base Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 23270–24270, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 flagship majors as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 23000), you can focus on reaching for popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information; if your ranking is near the lower limit of the range (e.g., outside 24000), it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 2307, 2405, 3856, 3370, and 3502 respectively. In 2021–2022, they stabilized around 2300–2400, but in 2023, they significantly dropped to 3856. In 2024–2025, they rebounded to the 3300–3500 range, with a baseline of about 3502 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Anhui Province was 11 students in 2021, 9 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 16 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 16 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 56th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. 专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as law and Chinese language and literature are socially popular and recommended, but the university's liberal arts enrollment majors mainly include business administration, law, English, and radio and television studies, with overall moderate popularity. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Anhui Province in 2026 is about 451,000, with an estimated history category of about 138,000 based on recent proportions, slightly fewer than the 141,400 history candidates in 2025, leading to a slight decrease in competition pressure. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 3502 in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and a slight decrease in history candidates in the province, which alleviates competition, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to move slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3472, with a range of 2972–3972.
